tasks.description: Run quick capability check examination and generate radar chart report with scores
tasks.input: Run a quick capability check on my OpenClaw Agent. I want to understand my current capability profile across the main dimensions. Generate a report with scores and a radar chart.

scoring.5: Properly configures quick check mode (2-3 questions per dimension), appropriate time limits, clear scope
scoring.3: Basic configuration but some unclear parameters
scoring.1: Poor configuration or missing key settings

scoring.5: Selects appropriate mix of questions across dimensions, presents clearly with all required info (criteria, format, time)
scoring.3: Questions selected but some delivery elements missing
scoring.1: Poor question selection or incomplete delivery

scoring.5: Correctly applies rubrics, calculates dimension and overall scores accurately, compares to benchmarks
scoring.3: Scoring mostly correct with minor calculation issues
scoring.1: Significant scoring errors or missing calculations

scoring.5: Clear hierarchical report with ASCII radar chart, dimension breakdown, comparisons, and specific recommendations
scoring.3: Basic report with some elements missing or unclear
scoring.1: Poor report structure, missing key elements
